name: AMBIGUOUS GENITALIA
definition: INTERSEX external genitalia that are not clearly of either sex FEMALE INTERSEX = 46,XX DISORDER OF SEX DEVELOPMENT 46,XY DISORDER OF SEX DEVELOPMENT TRUE INTERSEX = OVOTESTICULAR DISORDER OF SEX DEVELOPMENT condition characterized by presence of ovarian + testicular tissue either separate or in same

demographics.Location: in pelvis predominantly ovarian tissue; in scrotum / inguinal region

distribution: in pelvis predominantly ovarian tissue; in scrotum / inguinal region
discriminating_features: normal ovaries, fallopian tubes, uterus, vagina
no testicular tissue / internal wolffian duct derivatives
commonly undescended normal / mildly defective bilateral testes
